title: Retail Tower Console Live Control Map
summary: Planning-first admin web frontend topology for Retail Tower OS.

nodes.label: Browser console
nodes.description: Future admin web frontend for tenant, store, catalog, unknown-item, operator, and audit workflows.

nodes.label: Generated client
nodes.description: The console consumes generated clients from Data-Pulse-2 OpenAPI contracts. No handwritten API client code.

nodes.label: Data-Pulse-2 API
nodes.description: Backend authority for APIs, authorization, OpenAPI contracts, database schema, and business rules.

nodes.label: POS-Pulse
nodes.description: POS terminal behavior is owned by POS-Pulse. Console surfaces POS-originated data only through Data-Pulse-2.

nodes.label: RF-1 Auth shell
nodes.description: Auth shell and active context are the first route family after implementation gates clear.

nodes.label: RF-2 Tenant/store
nodes.description: Tenant and store management UI, backed by upstream authorization and generated client contracts.

nodes.label: RF-3 Catalog
nodes.description: Catalog management UI. Data-Pulse-2 remains the source of truth.

nodes.label: RF-4a Unknown items
nodes.description: Unknown item review queue UI. POS terminal behavior remains outside this repo.

nodes.label: RF-5 Audit search
nodes.description: Audit and operational search surface rendered from backend-authorized responses.

nodes.label: RF-6 Operators
nodes.description: Operator/admin management UI through generated Data-Pulse-2 clients.

nodes.label: Agent OS gates
nodes.description: Spec-first gates, allowed files, approval boundaries, and validation discipline.

nodes.label: Constitution
nodes.description: Frontend-only ownership, no backend/schema/OpenAPI ownership, no secrets, and no ungated package changes.
